leadText: A Shuca Berry (Japanese: シュカのみ Shuca Fruit) is a type of Berry introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Held item 1.2 Ingredient 1.3 Exchange 1.3.1 Pokémon Dream World Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] If the holder is hit by a supereffective Ground-type attack, it will consume its held Shuca Berry and halve the attack's damage. If the holder has Ripen , the damage is multiplied by 1/4. Ingredient [ edit | edit source ] Berry Blending OR AS Shuca Berries are yellow Berries that have a medium chance of producing a Pokéblock +. Poffin Cooking D P Pt BD SP When used alone, Shuca Berries will produce Poffins with Sweetness 13, Spiciness 8 and smoothness 29 when cooked in 1 minute with no spills or burns. Ice Cream Scoop DW Flavor 1 Flavor 2 Flavor 3 Easy to scoop Stickiness Juice Shoppe X Y Shuca Berries are yellow Berries in Group 2. Composting X Y Shuca Berries are yellow Berries. Dye Houses S M US UM 30 Shuca Berries, Chople Berries , and Charti Berries are used to dye any white or dyed clothing into dark orange. Curry Sw Sh Shuca Berries have a rarity of 5. Cram-o-matic Sw Sh Shuca Berries are Ground-type items and give 4 points towards the output value. Exchange [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Dream World [ edit | edit source ] In the Pokémon Dream World , the player could exchange Berries for Décor . The following Décor required Shuca Berries. Catalogue Décor Price Pokémon Doll Catalogue Chimchar Doll 15 Shuca Berries

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A Poffin ingredient. If held by a Pokémon, it weakens a foe's supereffective Ground-type attack. HG SS If held by a Pokémon, it weakens a foe's supereffective Ground-type attack. B W B2 W2 Weakens a supereffective Ground-type attack against the holding Pokémon. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA If held by a Pokémon, this Berry will lessen the damage taken from one supereffective Ground-type attack. S V If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Ground-type move, the power of that move will be weakened. Tag information [ edit | edit source ] No. 43 Size: 1.7" (4.2 cm) Firmness: Soft Games Description D P Pt BD SP The sweetness-laden pulp has just the hint of a hard-edged and fragrant bite to it. Curry information [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh A Berry with sweetness-laden pulp. It's delicious as is, but heating it up brings out a pleasant aroma.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods D P Pt Transfer from My Pokémon Ranch (held by Hayley's Pikachu ) Pastoria City Battle Frontier (Scratch-Off Cards) Held by wild Ponyta (5% chance) Ranch Hayley's trades (held by Pikachu ) HG SS Bought by player's Mom Battle Frontier (Scratch-Off Cards) Held by wild Ponyta and wild Rapidash (5% chance each) PW Stormy Beach , Yellow Forest , Winner's Path B W Held by wild Rapidash (5% chance) B2 W2 Join Avenue ( Flower Shop ) DW * First completion of the tutorial (player will be given five of one of the damage-reducing Berries from Fennel ) X Y Inverse House Yellow Berry trees OR AS Route 123 Inverse Battle Stop Master Rank Pokémon Contest Spectacular (given by fan) PMC * Poké Doll Grabber (Lv. 2) S M US UM Berry piles ( Poni Wilds , Poni Plains ) Ambush encounters ( Heliolisk in Ultra Space Wilds US UM ) Sw Sh Berry trees ( Lake of Outrage ) Sw Sh CT Berry trees ( Giant's Bed ) BD SP Pastoria City Picked up by walking Pokémon (Relaxed, Lax, Serious, Jolly, Naive, Modest, Mild, Rash Natures ) S V Sparkling overworld item ( North Province (Area One) ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period B W B2 W2 Pokémon Adventure Camp Fossil Shieldon Japanese July 21, 2012 to September 30, 2013 Growth [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV Planted 0 hours Sprouted 18 hours Taller 36 hours Flowering 54 hours Berries 72 hours A Shuca plant will yield 1-5 Berries. A growing Shuca plant's soil dries by 6% every hour, fully drying out in 17 hours. Generation V Planted 0 hours Sprouted 27 hours Taller 54 hours Flowering 81 hours Berries 108 hours A Shuca plant will yield ? Berries. Generation VI Pokémon X and Y Planted 0 hours Sprouted 8 hours Growing 16 hours Bigger 24 hours Budding 32 hours Bloom 40 hours Berries 48 hours A Shuca plant will yield 3-20 Berries. During its growth, watering the plant adds 1 Berries to the final harvest, weeding it adds 0.5, and removing a pest adds 2. Shuca plants attract Combee as pests. Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Planted 0 hours Sprouted 8 hours Taller 16 hours Flowering 24 hours Berries 32 hours A Shuca plant will yield 2-10 Berries. Generation VII Pokémon Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, and Ultra Moon Planted 0 hours Sprouted 30 hours Taller 36 hours Flowering 44 hours Berries 48 hours A Shuca plant will yield 2 Berries if Isle Aplenny is at Phase 1, 4 Berries if it is at Phase 2, and 6 Berries if it is at Phase 3. Generation VIII Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl Planted 0 hours Sprouted 18 hours Taller 36 hours Flowering 54 hours Berries 72 hours A Shuca plant will yield 2-5 Berries.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Origin [ edit | edit source ] The Shuca Berry's design and name may be based on a cashew .
